hooks.command: input=$(cat); if echo "$input" | grep -qE '"git mv|"git rm'; then cd /Users/zini/learn-claude-code && pnpm build 2>&1 | grep -E 'error|dead link|Error' | head -20; fi
input=$(cat); if echo "$input" | grep -q '\.md'; then cd /Users/zini/learn-claude-code && pnpm build 2>&1 | grep -E 'error|dead link|Error' | head -20; fi
